info.name: Furious Farmers
info.attribution:
Layout, board, cards, design, and coding by Jonathan Cox (email: Contact@GettingGames.com for inquiries) and released to the Public Domain under CC0.

The library image by LawDawg96 is released to the Public Domain under CC0.
info.description: Move farmers to the best locations on the map. To score points, place stones to enclose areas where you have the most farmers.
info.helpText:
Players take seats. Press Setup button to begin. A random player (indicated by a button next to the seat area) is chosen to start. To complete setup, take turns placing a farmer on any empty space until all farmers are on the board.

On your turn, manually move a farmer or place a stone according to the game rules. At the end of your turn, click the Current Turn button.

Manually keep score throughout the game by moving the marbles along the Score Track. If you score more than 50 points, drag a new marble from under the track and place it onto the track.

fields.label: Check this box and click the green button to reset the game.
Choose cursor style for all players.

fields.label: Remove this player from their seat

tgs6.text:
ON YOUR TURN: Perform three actions in order
1. Move a farmer
2. Move a farmer or place stone
3. Move a farmer or place stone

tgs7.text:
SCORE TERRITORY: When at most 3 land colors are within it.
• One color land: VPs = Spaces x 3
• Two color land: VPs = Spaces x 2
• Three color land: VPs = Spaces x 1
